title: Mid-Air Catch / Pickup
description: Ball thrown high; a player jumps into its path. Player must be able to collect through contact — automatic pickup, not a scripted catch. Player carries momentum state from the jump.

expected_outcomes.description: Player automatically picks up ball while airborne by moving through its path.
Player's airborne momentum state is preserved after collection — no snap-to-ground.

must_not_outcomes.description: Pickup only possible when grounded or via a catch animation — mid-air body contact fails.

notes: The Slam Dunk slam-dunk route depends on this — jumping toward the hoop while collecting a thrown ball is the key interaction.
